articles.title: Andrew was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages, watchdog reveals
articles.description: A public spending watchdog examines the property arrangements of royals including Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor.

articles.title: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
articles.description: The Greater Manchester mayor would need to win the by-election in Makerfield to be a possible candidate.

articles.title: World-first vaccine designed by AI could protect against whole families of viruses
articles.description: Cambridge scientists say they have, for the first time, tested a vaccine designed by AI.

articles.title: UK in most dangerous period I've known, military chief says
articles.description: Russian incursions into UK defences risk crossing a line, Chief of the Defence Staff Sir Richard Knighton tells the BBC.
